case_title: STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD VS. LINDA LEW

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER STEVEN MACDONALD'S MOTION FOR ORDER CORRECTING ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE ARBITRATION AWARD, AND CONFIRMING AWARD AS CORRECTED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-09-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MACDONALD, STEVEN ADAIR RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LEW, LINDA $7,515.84 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,515.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
